headline: Shell Profit Climbs as Iran War Boosts Oil Price, Trading
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Shell Plc reported stronger-than-expected first-quarter earnings as the Iran war boosted trading profits and drove up energy prices, helping it to overcome a drop in oil and gas production from the conflict. headline: Exxon Mobil Uses AI Seismic Tools To Reshape Guyana Project Pipeline
summary: Exxon Mobil (NYSE:XOM) is using AI powered seismic data analysis to speed up oil exploration work. The company is applying this technology first in Guyana to reassess previously overlooked assets. The new approach is cutting interpretation times and allowing faster screening of exploration prospects. For investors watching NYSE:XOM, this move sits at the core of how the company finds and ranks future projects. Seismic interpretation is a critical step in exploration, and using AI to process...
